info.title: ContosoAgentProviderClient
info.description: Contoso Agent Resource Provider management API.

get.description: List the operations for the provider
List ContosoApplianceAgent resources by subscription ID
List ContosoPlatformAgent resources by subscription ID
List ContosoApplianceAgent resources by resource group

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The resource properties to be updated.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

ApplianceConversation.description: Model template for a Conversation child resource of an Agent.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ApplianceConversationListResult.description: The response of a ApplianceConversation list operation.

value.description: The ApplianceConversation items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ApplianceConversationUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the ApplianceConversation.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ApplianceConversationUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the ApplianceConversation.

instructions.description: System prompt / behavioral instructions for this conversation.

ApplianceResponse.description: Model template for a Response child resource of an Agent.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ApplianceResponseListResult.description: The response of a ApplianceResponse list operation.

value.description: The ApplianceResponse items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ApplianceResponseUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the ApplianceResponse.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ApplianceResponseUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the ApplianceResponse.

model.description: Model ID used to generate the response. May be specified on request to override the agent default; read-only in GET.

input.description: Content input to the model. Required on create.

Azure.ResourceManager.BaseTypes.Agents.A.description:
A tool binding for an agent (Appliance deployment model).
All properties are read-only (the appliance owns and reports state).

type.description: Tool type discriminator. Must be one of the publicly documented Azure AI Foundry tool types.

Azure.ResourceManager.BaseTypes.Agents.A.description:
A tool binding for an agent (Platform deployment model).
All properties have default visibility (the client owns these fields).

type.description: Tool type discriminator. Must be one of the publicly documented Azure AI Foundry tool types.

Azure.ResourceManager.BaseTypes.Agents.I.description: A single input message provided to the model.

role.description: The role of the message author (for example, user, system, or developer).

content.description: The content of the input message.

values.name: Queued
values.description: The response is queued for execution.

Azure.ResourceManager.BaseTypes.BaseType.description:
An ARM-managed base type descriptor identifying the schema contract a resource conforms to.
Used as a parameter to the `@azureBaseType` decorator to indicate which
base types a resource conforms to.

version.description: The schema version of the base type.

Azure.ResourceManager.ResourceProvisioni.description: The provisioning state of a resource type.

ContosoApplianceAgent.description:
Model template for an Agent tracked resource.
Applies the Agent base type decorator automatically.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ContosoApplianceAgentListResult.description: The response of a ContosoApplianceAgent list operation.

value.description: The ContosoApplianceAgent items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ContosoApplianceAgentProperties.description:
Appliance deployment model of AgentProperties.
All properties are read-only (the appliance owns and reports state).

baseTypes.description: ARM-managed. Must include the base type descriptor for this resource.

tools.description: Tool bindings. Read-only in the Appliance deployment model.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

ContosoApplianceAgentTagsUpdate.description: The type used for updating tags in ContosoApplianceAgent resources.

ContosoApplianceDefinition.description:
Appliance deployment model of AgentDefinition.
Properties controlled by `@baseTypeOptional` are invisible when the corresponding
template parameter is false, or read-only when present.

instructions.description: System prompt / behavioral instructions for the agent.

modelDeploymentRef.description: Optional RP-specific reference to an underlying model deployment.

ContosoConversationProperties.description:
Properties for a conversation resource holding the items and metadata
exchanged between a client and an agent.

conversationId.description: Unique conversation identifier. Read-only (set by the service on creation).

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the conversation was created. Read-only.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

instructions.description: System prompt / behavioral instructions for this conversation.

ContosoPlatformAgent.description:
Model template for an Agent tracked resource.
Applies the Agent base type decorator automatically.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ContosoPlatformAgentListResult.description: The response of a ContosoPlatformAgent list operation.

value.description: The ContosoPlatformAgent items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ContosoPlatformAgentProperties.description:
Platform deployment model of AgentProperties.
Properties have default visibility (the client owns these fields).
baseTypes remains ARM-managed and read-only.

baseTypes.description: ARM-managed. Must include the base type descriptor for this resource.

tools.description: Tool bindings. Writable in the Platform deployment model.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

ContosoPlatformAgentTagsUpdate.description: The type used for updating tags in ContosoPlatformAgent resources.

ContosoPlatformDefinition.description:
Platform deployment model of AgentDefinition.
Properties controlled by `@baseTypeOptional` are invisible when the corresponding
template parameter is false, or have default visibility when present.

instructions.description: System prompt / behavioral instructions for the agent.

modelDeploymentRef.description: Optional RP-specific reference to an underlying model deployment.

ContosoResponseProperties.description:
Properties for a response generated by an agent for a given input,
including its output, status, and usage.

responseId.description: Unique response identifier. Read-only (set by the service).

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the response was created. Read-only.

model.description: Model ID used to generate the response. May be specified on request to override the agent default; read-only in GET.

status.description: The status of the response. Read-only.

input.description: Content input to the model. Required on create.

previousResponseId.description: ID of a previous response for multi-turn chaining. Writable on create.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

PlatformConversation.description: Model template for a Conversation child resource of an Agent.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

PlatformConversationListResult.description: The response of a PlatformConversation list operation.

value.description: The PlatformConversation items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

PlatformConversationUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the PlatformConversation.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

PlatformConversationUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the PlatformConversation.

instructions.description: System prompt / behavioral instructions for this conversation.

PlatformResponse.description: Model template for a Response child resource of an Agent.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

PlatformResponseListResult.description: The response of a PlatformResponse list operation.

value.description: The PlatformResponse items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

PlatformResponseUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the PlatformResponse.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

PlatformResponseUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the PlatformResponse.

model.description: Model ID used to generate the response. May be specified on request to override the agent default; read-only in GET.

input.description: Content input to the model. Required on create.
